---
title: "Analysis"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(sf)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
# Paths (match what the UPDATED Python script writes)
# 1) Main file: contains q_pred_m3s_raw, q_pred_m3s_constrained, temp_pred_C
#pred_path <- "/Users/danieldominguez/Documents/Code/DDNN_ILOH/data/daily_drivers/hydro_temp_data_analysis_pre2013_predictions_optionA.parquet"

# 2) Optional legacy file: constrained-only (q_pred_m3s + temp_pred_C)
#pred_con_legacy_path <- "/Users/danieldominguez/Documents/Code/DDNN_ILOH/data/daily_drivers/hydro_temp_data_analysis_pre2013_predictions_optionA_constrained_only.parquet"

```

```{r}

source("SRC/Functions_Paths.R")

# 1) Main file (pred_df)
pred_path <- "/Users/danieldominguez/Documents/Code/DDNN_ILOH/data/daily_drivers/hydro_temp_data_analysis_pre2013_predictions_graph_pre2013.parquet"

pred_df <- read_parquet(pred_path)

daily_drivers <-  "/Users/danieldominguez/Documents/Code/DDNN_ILOH/data/daily_drivers/hydro_temp_data_trainval_2013plus.parquet"

daily_drivers_df<-read_parquet(daily_drivers)

comid_streamorder <- daily_drivers_df %>%
  distinct(comid, streamorde) %>%
  arrange(streamorde, comid)

pred_df <- pred_df %>%
  left_join(
    daily_drivers_df %>%
      distinct(comid, streamorde) %>%
      rename(streamorder = streamorde),
    by = "comid"
  )
```


```{r}
# -------------------------
# Load predictions (UPDATED outputs)
# -------------------------
pred <- read_parquet(pred_path) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))


# Quick sanity checks
glimpse(pred)
summary(pred$q_pred_m3s_raw)
summary(pred$q_pred_m3s_constrained)
summary(pred$temp_pred_C)


```

```{r}
# -------------------------
# Overall summaries (raw vs constrained)
# -------------------------
overall_summary <- pred %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),

    # RAW Q
    frac_neg_q_raw  = mean(q_pred_m3s_raw <  0, na.rm = TRUE),
    frac_zero_q_raw = mean(q_pred_m3s_raw == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    frac_pos_q_raw  = mean(q_pred_m3s_raw >  0, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_q_raw = min(q_pred_m3s_raw, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_q_raw = median(q_pred_m3s_raw, na.rm = TRUE),
    p95_q_raw = quantile(q_pred_m3s_raw, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_q_raw = max(q_pred_m3s_raw, na.rm = TRUE),

    # CONSTRAINED Q
    frac_zero_q_con = mean(q_pred_m3s_constrained == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    frac_pos_q_con  = mean(q_pred_m3s_constrained >  0, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_q_con = min(q_pred_m3s_constrained, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_q_con = median(q_pred_m3s_constrained, na.rm = TRUE),
    p95_q_con = quantile(q_pred_m3s_constrained, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_q_con = max(q_pred_m3s_constrained, na.rm = TRUE),

    # Temp
    min_t = min(temp_pred_C, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_t = median(temp_pred_C, na.rm = TRUE),
    p95_t = quantile(temp_pred_C, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_t = max(temp_pred_C, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

overall_summary

```


```{r}
# -------------------------
# Two-bin summary helper (for Q sign checks)
# -------------------------
two_bin_summary <- function(df, col) {
  x <- df[[col]]
  n_total <- sum(!is.na(x))
  n_neg <- sum(x < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_pos <- sum(x > 0, na.rm = TRUE)

  tibble(
    col = col,
    n_total = n_total,
    n_neg   = n_neg,
    pct_neg = 100 * n_neg / pmax(n_total, 1),
    n_pos   = n_pos,
    pct_pos = 100 * n_pos / pmax(n_total, 1)
  )
}

bind_rows(
  two_bin_summary(pred, "q_pred_m3s_raw") %>% mutate(dataset = "pred"),
  two_bin_summary(pred, "q_pred_m3s_constrained") %>% mutate(dataset = "pred")
) %>%
  select(dataset, everything())

```

```{r}

# -------------------------
# Histograms (log-y): Q raw, Q constrained, Temp
# -------------------------
ggplot(pred, aes(x = q_pred_m3s_raw)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 250) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "Histogram: Predicted Discharge (q_pred_m3s_raw)",
    x = "Predicted Q (m³/s)",
    y = "Count (log10)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

ggplot(pred, aes(x = q_pred_m3s_constrained)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 250) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "Histogram: Predicted Discharge (q_pred_m3s_constrained)",
    x = "Predicted Q (m³/s)",
    y = "Count (log10)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

ggplot(pred, aes(x = temp_pred_C)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 200) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "Histogram: Predicted Water Temperature (temp_pred_C)",
    x = "Predicted Temp (°C)",
    y = "Count (log10)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

```

```{r}
# -------------------------
# Yearly summaries (choose which Q column you want)
# -------------------------
yearly_q_counts <- pred %>%
  mutate(year = year(date)) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    # RAW Q
    n_total_raw = sum(!is.na(q_pred_m3s_raw)),
    n_neg_raw   = sum(q_pred_m3s_raw < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_zero_raw  = sum(q_pred_m3s_raw == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_pos_raw   = sum(q_pred_m3s_raw > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_neg_raw  = 100 * n_neg_raw  / pmax(n_total_raw, 1),
    pct_zero_raw = 100 * n_zero_raw / pmax(n_total_raw, 1),
    pct_pos_raw  = 100 * n_pos_raw  / pmax(n_total_raw, 1),
    min_q_raw = min(q_pred_m3s_raw, na.rm = TRUE),
    p05_q_raw = quantile(q_pred_m3s_raw, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_q_raw = median(q_pred_m3s_raw, na.rm = TRUE),
    p95_q_raw = quantile(q_pred_m3s_raw, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_q_raw = max(q_pred_m3s_raw, na.rm = TRUE),

    # CONSTRAINED Q
    n_total_con = sum(!is.na(q_pred_m3s_constrained)),
    n_zero_con  = sum(q_pred_m3s_constrained == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_pos_con   = sum(q_pred_m3s_constrained > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_zero_con = 100 * n_zero_con / pmax(n_total_con, 1),
    pct_pos_con  = 100 * n_pos_con  / pmax(n_total_con, 1),
    min_q_con = min(q_pred_m3s_constrained, na.rm = TRUE),
    p05_q_con = quantile(q_pred_m3s_constrained, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_q_con = median(q_pred_m3s_constrained, na.rm = TRUE),
    p95_q_con = quantile(q_pred_m3s_constrained, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_q_con = max(q_pred_m3s_constrained, na.rm = TRUE),

    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

yearly_q_counts

```

```{r}
# -------------------------
# COMID-year summary: % zero / % positive (RAW vs constrained)
# -------------------------
comid_year_summary <- pred %>%
  mutate(year = year(date)) %>%
  group_by(comid, year) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),

    # RAW Q
    pct_neg_raw  = 100 * mean(q_pred_m3s_raw < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_zero_raw = 100 * mean(q_pred_m3s_raw == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_pos_raw  = 100 * mean(q_pred_m3s_raw >  0, na.rm = TRUE),

    # CONSTRAINED Q
    pct_zero_con = 100 * mean(q_pred_m3s_constrained == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_pos_con  = 100 * mean(q_pred_m3s_constrained >  0, na.rm = TRUE),

    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Top 50 COMID-years that are fully zero after constraint
comid_year_summary %>%
  filter(pct_zero_con == 100) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  head(50)

# How many unique COMIDs have at least one fully-zero year (constrained)?
comid_year_summary %>%
  summarise(n_comid_any_allzero_year_con = n_distinct(comid[pct_zero_con == 100]))


```

```{r}
# -------------------------
# Map predictions for ONE day on NHD flowlines
# -------------------------

flowlines_path <- "/Users/danieldominguez/Documents/Code/DDNN_ILOH/data/nhdplus/flowlines.gpkg"
day_to_plot <- as.Date("2008-07-22")

# Helper: guess COMID column in flowlines
guess_comid_col <- function(x) {
  nms <- names(x)
  # common candidates first
  cand <- c("comid", "COMID", "ComID", "nhdplus_comid", "NHDPlusCOMID", "NHDPlusID", "nhdplusid")
  hit <- cand[cand %in% nms]
  if (length(hit) > 0) return(hit[1])
  # fallback: any column containing "comid"
  hit2 <- nms[grepl("comid", tolower(nms))]
  if (length(hit2) > 0) return(hit2[1])
  stop("Could not find a COMID column in flowlines.gpkg. Columns: ", paste(nms, collapse=", "))
}

# 1) Filter predictions to one day
pred_day <- pred %>%
  filter(date == day_to_plot) %>%
  mutate(comid = as.integer(comid))

cat("\nDay filter:", as.character(day_to_plot), "\n")
cat("Rows in pred_day:", nrow(pred_day), "\n")
cat("Unique COMIDs in pred_day:", n_distinct(pred_day$comid), "\n")

if (nrow(pred_day) == 0) {
  stop("No prediction rows found for day_to_plot. Check date range in pred.")
}

# 2) Read flowlines + find COMID column
flow <- st_read(flowlines_path, quiet = TRUE)

comid_col <- guess_comid_col(flow)
cat("Detected flowlines COMID column:", comid_col, "\n")

flow <- flow %>%
  mutate(comid = as.integer(.data[[comid_col]]))

# 3) Join predictions onto flowlines (keep all flowlines for gray basemap)
flow_join <- flow %>%
  left_join(pred_day, by = "comid")

cat("Flowlines total:", nrow(flow_join), "\n")
cat("Flowlines w/ predictions (non-NA Q):", sum(!is.na(flow_join$q_pred_m3s_constrained)), "\n")

# Optional: crop to bounding box of predicted flowlines (for tighter map)
pred_bbox <- st_bbox(flow_join[!is.na(flow_join$q_pred_m3s_constrained), ])
flow_base <- st_crop(flow_join, pred_bbox)

# -------------------------
# Plot 1: Discharge (constrained)
# -------------------------
p_q <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = flow_base, color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.1) +
  geom_sf(
    data = dplyr::filter(flow_base, !is.na(q_pred_m3s_constrained)),
    aes(color = q_pred_m3s_constrained),
    linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(
    option = "C",
    trans = "identity",              # helps visually like your example; change to "identity" if you want linear
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 1),
    name = "Q (m³/s)"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted discharge (constrained) on flowlines",
    subtitle = paste0("Date: ", day_to_plot, " | colored = COMIDs present in prediction set")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_q

# -------------------------
# Plot 2: Water temperature
# -------------------------
p_t <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = flow_base, color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.01) +
  geom_sf(
    data = dplyr::filter(flow_base, !is.na(temp_pred_C)),
    aes(color = temp_pred_C),
    linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(
    option = "C",
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.1),
    name = "Temp (°C)"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted water temperature on flowlines",
    subtitle = paste0("Date: ", day_to_plot, " | colored = COMIDs present in prediction set")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_t

```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# Reproduce TEMP map with flagged COMIDs removed
#   - Uses the troubleshooting COMID list saved locally
# =========================================================

# Local path (your directory)
temp_troubleshoot_comid_counts_path <- "/Users/danieldominguez/Documents/Code/DDNN_ILOH/data/daily_drivers/temp_troubleshooting_comid_rowcounts.csv"

# 1) Read COMIDs to remove
comids_remove <- read.csv(temp_troubleshoot_comid_counts_path) %>%
  mutate(comid = as.integer(comid)) %>%
  filter(n_rows_hotspots > 0 | n_rows_bad_temp_file > 0) %>%
  distinct(comid)

cat("\n[COMID Removal] flagged COMIDs:", nrow(comids_remove), "\n")

# 2) Recreate pred_day for the same day, but REMOVE those COMIDs
pred_day_filt <- pred %>%
  filter(date == day_to_plot) %>%
  mutate(comid = as.integer(comid)) %>%
  anti_join(comids_remove, by = "comid")

cat("[Filtered day] Rows:", nrow(pred_day_filt), "\n")
cat("[Filtered day] Unique COMIDs:", n_distinct(pred_day_filt$comid), "\n")

if (nrow(pred_day_filt) == 0) {
  stop("After filtering flagged COMIDs, no prediction rows remain for this day.")
}

# 3) Join filtered predictions onto flowlines
flow_join_filt <- flow %>%
  left_join(pred_day_filt, by = "comid")

cat("[Filtered join] Flowlines w/ predictions (non-NA Temp):",
    sum(!is.na(flow_join_filt$temp_pred_C)), "\n")

# 4) Crop bbox based on TEMP (since we’re reproducing temp plot)
pred_bbox_filt <- st_bbox(flow_join_filt[!is.na(flow_join_filt$temp_pred_C), ])
flow_base_filt <- st_crop(flow_join_filt, pred_bbox_filt)

# 5) Plot: Water temperature (filtered COMIDs removed)
p_t_filtered <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = flow_base_filt, color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.01) +
  geom_sf(
    data = dplyr::filter(flow_base_filt, !is.na(temp_pred_C)),
    aes(color = temp_pred_C),
    linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(
    option = "C",
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.1),
    name = "Temp (°C)"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted water temperature on flowlines (flagged COMIDs removed)",
    subtitle = paste0("Date: ", day_to_plot,
                      " | removed COMIDs in temp troubleshooting list (n=",
                      nrow(comids_remove), ")")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_t_filtered


```
